name: Vacant Land
description: This form is used for the sale of vacant land. This form is actually three forms in one; offer, purchase and sale agreement and escrow instructions.
keywords: Purchasing Property, Standard Offer, Agreement and Escrow Instructions for Purchase of Vacant Land, Standard Offer Agreement

fields.name: Purchase Money Deed of Trust Amount
Buyer Has Delivered Check to Broker
Days to Deliver Check to Escrow Holder
Days after Agreement has been Executed
New Loan Percent of Purchase Price
Notification Days of No New Loan
Brokers Fee Percent of Purchase Price

If said check is not received by Escrow Holder within said time period then Seller may elect to unilaterally terminate this transaction by giving written notice of such election to Escrow Holder whereupon neither Party shall have any further liability to the other under this Agreement.  Should Buyer and Seller not enter into an agreement for purchase and sale, Buyer's check or funds shall, upon request by Buyer, be promptly returned to Buyer." /></t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="4.2	Additional deposits:" />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Paragraph.ParagraphSymbolPropertiesStyle>
        <s:SpanProperties FlowDirection="LeftToRight" />
      </t:Paragraph.ParagraphSymbolPropertiesStyle>
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(a)	Within 5 business days after the Date of Agreement, Buyer shall deposit with Escrow Holder the additional sum of " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="44" FieldDataType="2" FieldTypeID="20041" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Additional Escrow Amount 1" SectionName="4.2(a)" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="44" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=" to be applied to the Purchase Price at the Closing." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(b)	Within 5 business days after the contingencies discussed in paragraph 9.1 (a) through (m) are approved or waived, Buyer shall deposit with Escrow Holder the additional sum of " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="45" FieldDataType="2" FieldTypeID="20042" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Additional Escrow Amount 2" SectionName="4.2(b)" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="45" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=" to be applied to the Purchase Price at the Closing." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(c)	If an Additional Deposit is not received by Escrow Holder within the time period  provided then Seller may notify Buyer, Escrow Holder, and Brokers, in writing that, unless the Additional Deposit is received by Escrow Holder within 2 business days following said notice, the Escrow shall be deemed terminated without further notice or instructions." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="4.3	Escrow Holder shall deposit the funds deposited with it by Buyer pursuant to paragraphs 4.1 and 4.2 (collectively the "" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="Deposit" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=""), in a State or Federally chartered bank in an interest bearing account whose term is appropriate and consistent with the timing requirements of this transaction.  The interest therefrom shall accrue to the benefit of Buyer, who hereby acknowledges that there may be penalties or interest forfeitures if the applicable instrument is redeemed prior to its specified maturity.  Buyer's Federal Tax Identification Number is " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="46" FieldDataType="1" FieldTypeID="1212" IsHistoryEnabled="True" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Buyer Federal ID No." SectionName="4.3" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="46" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=".  NOTE: Such interest bearing account cannot be opened until Buyer's Federal Tax Identification Number is provided." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="4.4	Notwithstanding the foregoing, within 5 days after Escrow Holder receives the monies described in paragraph 4.1 above, Escrow Holder shall release $100 of said monies to Seller as and for independent consideration for Seller's' execution of this Agreement and the granting of the contingency period to Buyer as herein provided.  Such independent consideration is non-refundable to Buyer but shall be credited to the Purchase Price in the event that the purchase of the Property is completed." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="L2ParWithSpace">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="4.5	Upon waiver of all of Buyer's contingencies the Deposit shall become non-refundable but applicable to the Purchase Price except in the event of a Seller breach, or in the event that the Escrow is terminated pursuant to the provisions of Paragraph 9.1(n) (Destruction, Damage or Loss) or 9.1(o) (Material Change)." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level1Paragraph">
      <t:Paragraph.ParagraphSymbolPropertiesStyle>
        <s:SpanProperties FlowDirection="LeftToRight" />
      </t:Paragraph.ParagraphSymbolPropertiesStyle>
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="5.	Financing Contingency." />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="  " />
      <t:Span FontStyle="Italic" StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(Strike if not applicable)" />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="5.1	This offer is contingent upon Buyer obtaining from an insurance company, financial institution or other lender, a commitment to lend to Buyer a sum equal to at least " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="47" FieldDataType="1" FieldTypeID="20043" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="New Loan Percent of Purchase Price" SectionName="5.1" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="47" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="% of the Purchase Price, on terms acceptable to Buyer.  Such loan ("" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="New Loan" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="") shall be secured by a first deed of trust or mortgage on the Property.  If this Agreement provides for Seller to carry back junior financing, then Seller shall have the right to approve the terms of the New Loan.  Seller shall have 7 days from receipt of the commitment setting forth the proposed terms of the New Loan to approve or disapprove of such proposed terms.  If Seller fails to notify Escrow Holder, in writing, of the disapproval within said 7 days it shall be conclusively presumed that Seller has approved the terms of the New Loan." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="5.2	" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="If Buyer shall fail to notify its Broker, Escrow Holder and Seller, in writing within " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="48" FieldDataType="1" FieldTypeID="20044" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Notification Days of No New Loan" SectionName="5.2" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="48" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text=" days following the Date of Agreement, that the New Loan has not been obtained, it shall be conclusively presumed that Buyer has either obtained said New Loan or has waived this New Loan contingency." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="L2ParWithSpace">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="5.3	If Buyer shall notify its Broker, Escrow Holder and Seller, in writing, within the time specified in paragraph 5.2 hereof, that Buyer has not obtained said New Loan, this Agreement shall be terminated, and Buyer shall be entitled to the prompt return of the Deposit, plus any interest earned thereon, less only Escrow Holder and Title Company cancellation fees and costs, which Buyer shall pay." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level1Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="6.	Seller Financing." />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="  (Purchase Money Note).  " />
      <t:Span FontStyle="Italic" StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(Strike if not applicable)" />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="6.1	If Seller approves Buyer's financials (see paragraph 6.5) the Purchase Money Note shall provide for interest on unpaid principal at the rate of " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="49" FieldDataType="1" FieldTypeID="20045" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Purchase Money Note Interest" SectionName="6.1" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="49" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="% per annum, with principal and interest paid as follows: " />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="50" FieldDataType="1" FieldTypeID="20046" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Purchase Money Paid as Follows" SectionName="6.1" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="50" />
      <t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=".  The Purchase Money Note and Purchase Money Deed of Trust shall be on the current forms commonly used by Escrow Holder, and be junior and subordinate only to the Existing Note(s) and/or the New Loan expressly called for by this Agreement." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="6.2	The Purchase Money Note and/or the Purchase Money Deed of Trust shall contain provisions regarding the following (see also paragraph 10.3 (b)):" />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(a)	" />
      <t:Span FontStyle="Italic" StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="Prepayment" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=".  Principal may be prepaid in whole or in part at any time without penalty, at the option of the Buyer." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(b)	" />
      <t:Span FontStyle="Italic" StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="Late Charge" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=".  A late charge of 6% shall be payable with respect to any payment of principal, interest, or other charges, not made within 10 days after it is due." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level3Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="(c)	" />
      <t:Span FontStyle="Italic" StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="Due On Sale" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text=".  In the event the Buyer sells or transfers title to the Property or any portion thereof, then the Seller may, at Seller's option, require the entire unpaid balance of said Note to be paid in full." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="6.3	If the Purchase Money Deed of Trust is to be subordinate to other financing, Escrow Holder shall, at Buyer's expense prepare and record on Seller's behalf a request for notice of default and/or sale with regard to each mortgage or deed of trust to which it will be subordinate." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="6.4	" />
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="WARNING: CALIFORNIA LAW DOES NOT ALLOW DEFICIENCY JUDGEMENTS ON SELLER FINANCING.  IF BUYER ULTIMATELY DEFAULTS ON THE LOAN, SELLER'S SOLE REMEDY IS TO FORECLOSE ON THE PROPERTY." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="L2ParWithSpace">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="6.5	Seller's obligation to provide financing is contingent upon Seller's reasonable approval of Buyer's financial condition.  Buyer to provide a current financial statement and copies of its Federal tax returns for the last 3 years to Seller within 10 days following the Date of Agreement.  Seller has 10 days following receipt of such documentation to satisfy itself with regard to Buyer's financial condition and to notify Escrow Holder as to whether or not Buyer's financial condition is acceptable.  If Seller fails to notify Escrow Holder, in writing, of the disapproval of this contingency within said time period, it shall be conclusively presumed that Seller has approved Buyer's financial condition.  If Seller is not satisfied with Buyer's financial condition or if Buyer fails to deliver the required documentation then Seller may notify Escrow Holder in writing that Seller Financing will not be available, and Buyer shall have the option, within 10 days of the receipt of such notice, to either terminate this transaction or to purchase the Property without Seller financing.  If Buyer fails to notify Escrow Holder within said time period of its election to terminate this transaction then Buyer shall be conclusively presumed to have elected to purchase the Property without Seller financing.  If Buyer elects to terminate, Buyer's Deposit shall be refunded less Title Company and Escrow Holder cancellation fees and costs, all of which shall be Buyer's obligation." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level1Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyleBold" Text="7.	Real Estate Brokers." />
    </t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">

or" /><t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " /><custom1:FieldRangeStart AnnotationID="62" FieldDataType="3" FieldTypeID="20051" IsHistoryEnabled="False" IsLinked="True" IsRequired="False" MinLength="5" Name="Buyer Broker Represents Both Parties" SectionName="7.1" /><InlineUIContainer Width="13.333333333333" Height="13.333333333333" FieldStart="{x:Null}" StyleName="" Tag="{x:Null}" Cursor="IBeam" OriginalProperties="{x:Null}" RevisionInfo="{x:Null}" xmlns="http://schemas.telerik.com/2008/xaml/presentation" xmlns:av="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:twdl="clr-namespace:Telerik.Windows.Documents.Layout;assembly=Telerik.Windows.Documents"><av:CheckBox IsChecked="False" Width="13" Height="13" Margin="0,0,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" twdl:LayoutBox.AssociatedLayoutBox="{x:Null}" /></InlineUIContainer><custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="62" /><t:Span StyleName="FieldBeforeAfterStyle" Text=" " /><t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="both the Buyer and Seller (dual agent)." /></t:Paragraph>
    <t:Paragraph StyleName="Level2Paragraph">
      <t:Span StyleName="OriginalContentStyle" Text="Buyer's Agent  " />

      <t:Span StyleName="FieldContentStyle" Text="     " />
      <custom1:FieldRangeEnd AnnotationID="64" />
